name: Story Quality
description: Evaluates the quality of the generated plot/story from the content-creator phase.

dimensions.name: narrative_coherence
dimensions.criteria: Does the story have a clear beginning, middle, and end? Are events logically connected?

scoringGuide.excellent: Crystal clear narrative arc with seamless transitions between events. Every scene flows naturally from the previous one.
scoringGuide.good: Solid narrative structure with minor gaps. Most transitions are smooth.
scoringGuide.adequate: Basic narrative present but some events feel disconnected or rushed.
scoringGuide.poor: Story lacks clear structure. Events seem random or contradictory.

dimensions.name: faithfulness_to_input
dimensions.criteria: Does the story faithfully adapt the user's original concept? Are all key elements from the input preserved?

scoringGuide.excellent: All elements from the user input are present and expanded upon naturally. Nothing important is dropped or contradicted.
scoringGuide.good: Most input elements preserved. Minor details might be adjusted but core concept intact.
scoringGuide.adequate: Core concept present but several input elements missing or significantly altered.
scoringGuide.poor: Story diverges significantly from the user's input. Key elements dropped or contradicted.

dimensions.name: visual_translatability
dimensions.criteria: Is the story written in a way that translates well to visual scenes? Are there concrete, filmable moments rather than abstract ideas?

scoringGuide.excellent: Every scene is visually concrete with specific actions, settings, and visual details that can be directly filmed.
scoringGuide.good: Most scenes have clear visual elements. Some moments might be slightly abstract.
scoringGuide.adequate: Mix of visual and abstract elements. Some scenes would be hard to represent visually.
scoringGuide.poor: Story is mostly abstract, internal, or narrative-heavy with few filmable moments.

dimensions.name: emotional_engagement
dimensions.criteria: Does the story evoke emotional engagement? Is there stakes, tension, or emotional resonance?

scoringGuide.excellent: Deeply engaging with clear emotional stakes. Viewer would feel invested in the outcome.
scoringGuide.good: Emotionally engaging with some genuine moments of connection or tension.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some emotional content but feels surface-level or formulaic.
scoringGuide.poor: Flat and emotionally disengaging. No stakes or tension.
